requirements_addressed: Factory functions make_envelope and make_envelope_json in conftest.py
All 23 BDD scenarios implemented as pytest tests
Pytest markers smoke, key_example, boundary, negative, edge_case configured

completion_promises.criterion_text: tests/conftest.py includes factory functions for creating test MessageEnvelope instances: make_envelope(**overrides) -> MessageEnvelope with sensible defaults, make_envelope_json(**overrides) -> str for JSON deserialisation tests
completion_promises.evidence: Added make_envelope() and make_envelope_json() to tests/conftest.py. make_envelope defaults source_id='test-agent', event_type=EventType.STATUS, payload={'key': 'value'}. make_envelope_json serialises a make_envelope() result to JSON string. Both accept **overrides. Original MockEnvelopeData and make_envelope_data preserved for backward compatibility with TASK-ME01 scaffolding tests.

completion_promises.criterion_text: tests/test_envelope.py implements all 23 BDD scenarios: 4 smoke tests, 5 key-example tests, 6 boundary tests, 4 negative tests, 8 edge-case tests
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented all 23 BDD scenarios in tests/test_envelope.py across 5 test classes: TestBddSmoke (4 tests), TestBddKeyExample (2 unique + 3 dual-tagged in smoke = 5 key-example scenarios), TestBddBoundary (6 scenarios including parametrized optional None x2), TestBddNegative (3 unique + 1 dual-tagged in smoke = 4 negative scenarios), TestBddEdgeCase (8 tests). Each test maps to a specific BDD scenario with assertions matching all 'Then' clauses. Total: 4+2+6+3+8 = 23 unique BDD scenarios.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tests use pytest markers matching BDD tags: @pytest.mark.smoke, @pytest.mark.boundary, @pytest.mark.negative, @pytest.mark.edge_case
completion_promises.evidence: All BDD test methods are decorated with appropriate pytest markers: @pytest.mark.smoke (4 tests), @pytest.mark.key_example (6 tests), @pytest.mark.boundary (7 test functions), @pytest.mark.negative (6 test functions), @pytest.mark.edge_case (8 tests). Dual-tagged scenarios (e.g. smoke+negative, boundary+negative) carry both markers.

completion_promises.criterion_text: pytest marker configuration added to pyproject.toml
completion_promises.evidence: Added 5 new markers to pyproject.toml [tool.pytest.ini_options].markers: smoke, key_example, boundary, negative, edge_case — each with descriptive text. Existing markers (slow, integration, seam) preserved.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All tests pass with pytest tests/ -v
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'python -m pytest tests/ -v --cov=src/nats_core --cov-report=term --cov-report=json'. Result: 75 passed, 0 failed in 0.11s. All pre-existing TASK-ME01 and TASK-ME02 tests continue to pass alongside the 23 new BDD scenario tests.
Coverage for src/nats_core/envelope.py: 39 statements, 0 missed, 100% coverage. Total project coverage: 44 statements, 0 missed, 100%. Exceeds the 95% threshold.
